relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains customer product holdings and account data (balances, account numbers, product details), while the outbound file contains marketing campaign metadata (budgets, target segments, success metrics, customer service requirements). These represent fundamentally different domains: one is transactional account data, the other is campaign planning and execution data. There is no meaningful field overlap, and the outbound schema cannot be reasonably derived from transforming the inbound schema. The files serve entirely different purposes within their respective systems.
